title: Flowers Bread Route, Springdale, AR
reasonForSelling: The owner is pursuing another business opportunity.
supportTraining: Owner and company will train. Most company routes require the buyer to form an entity (must be an INC). If you need help with this visit https://www.routesforsale.net/incorporate.html
description:
Imagine stepping into a thriving bread distribution business that's already built for your success. This Flowers Bread Route in Springdale, Arkansas offers you the chance to own a turnkey operation backed by one of America's most trusted baking companies.

You'll be distributing beloved household brands like Nature's Own, Cobblestone Bread, and Dave's Killer Bread - products that practically sell themselves. With 11 established accounts including popular grocery stores, convenience stores, and restaurants, you're walking into relationships that are already built and profitable.

Here's what makes this opportunity special: you'll generate approximately $1,000,896 in annual sales while netting a solid $150,332. That's the kind of steady income that gives you peace of mind and financial security.

Worried about financing? The company offers financing options with an estimated $101,000 down payment, plus you'll need a 10% cash reserve. This isn't just any small business - you're partnering with Flowers Baking Co., a publicly traded company on the NYSE, which means stability and support you can count on.

Your territory is protected, so you won't have to worry about competition from other Flowers distributors moving into your area. You'll have the exclusive right to serve these accounts and grow your business within your designated region.

This is more than just a route - it's your pathway to business ownership with a proven track record. You'll have the backing of an established brand, loyal customers who depend on fresh bread daily, and a business model that's been successful for decades.

Ad#:2452318
